hero.title: Know your numbers without waiting for your accountant
hero.subtitle: Connect your bank. See expenses categorized. Track your runway — updated daily, not monthly.
hero.beFirst: Be the first to know when we launch.

problem.label: The problem
problem.p1: Your accountant tells you how you did last month.
problem.p2: But you need to know how you're doing
problem.p3: How much runway do you have? Are subscriptions eating your cash? Is that client payment late?
problem.p4: By the time the report arrives, the decisions are already made.

solution.label: The solution
solution.p1: Polso gives you real-time visibility into your finances.
solution.p2: Connect your bank. Transactions sync and categorize automatically. Your runway updates every day.
solution.p3: When you meet your accountant, you already know the numbers. And you can export everything they need in one click.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Get started in minutes
howItWorks.step3Description: Runway, burn rate, cash flow — always current.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need to understand your finances
features.realtimeDashboardDesc: Balance, income, expenses, cash flow, burn rate, runway — always current.
features.bankSyncDesc: Connect via Open Banking. Daily auto-sync.
features.recurringDetectionDesc: Subscriptions and fixed costs found automatically.
features.exportForAccountantDesc: One-click ZIP with CSV, PDF report, and all receipts. Ready for handoff.
features.incomeTrackingDesc: Track payments by source and client.
features.smartAlertsDesc: Low balance. High spend. Runway warnings.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple pricing by organization
pricing.subtitle: No per-seat fees. 14-day free trial. Cancel anytime.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes. We use Tink for bank connections. We never see or store your bank credentials. All data is encrypted.
faq.a2: Over 12,000 institutions via Open Banking. Most major banks in Europe and US are supported.
faq.a3: Polso uses a 4-level system: vendor defaults, bank categories, keyword matching, and fallback rules. Every transaction shows why it was categorized with a confidence score.
faq.a4: Yes. You can invite your accountant as a user, or simply export everything they need as a ZIP file each month.
faq.a5: After 14 days, choose a plan or lose access. Your data stays for 30 days in case you decide to subscribe later.

builtFor.label: Built for
builtFor.title: If this sounds familiar, Polso is for you
builtFor.freelancersSolution: Track every payment. Know what you owe.
builtFor.soloFoundersSolution: Runway updates daily. Decide with real numbers.
